retrieval_trace.query: Can a learner still keep to the two-year schedule after pausing their studies or retaking work?

results.answer: No, a learner cannot keep to the two-year (24 months) schedule if they take a break from their studies or need to undertake reassessment. The indicative study duration of 24 months is based on studying each module consecutively without breaks. Taking a break or needing reassessment will make it impossible to adhere to this duration.
